name: Japan Insulation Co., Ltd.
summary: Japan Insulation Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of heat insulating materials worldwide. It offers thermal insulation and fire-resistant cladding materials for plant equipment; fire-resistant cladding materials for the design of general buildings; non-combustible interior materials for the design of general buildings; mold material for molding carbon fiber reinforced plastic composite material; humidity conditioning building materials; board for carving out letters and sculptures; and lightweight inorganic powder. The company was founded in 1914 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
